Home.title: Welcome to {name}
Home.description: The ultimate Minecraft experience. Join thousands of players in our custom-built worlds with unique mechanics, economy, and community events.
Home.footer: © {year} ExiledProject. Not affiliated with Mojang AB.

Tickets.title: Resolve purchases, appeals and account issues from one support hub
Tickets.description: The tickets page keeps all conversations, response times and ticket status changes in one place so players and staff can work without losing context.

fastReplies.title: Fast first response
fastReplies.description: Purchase and account categories are automatically routed to the right support queue.

appeals.title: Appeals and reports
appeals.description: Ban appeals, moderation reports and security incidents can be reviewed in one workflow.

tracking.title: Transparent status tracking
tracking.description: Players can see who owns the ticket, when it was updated and what still needs a reply.

queue.title: Active tickets queue
queue.description: Operators can quickly switch between payment, appeals and account recovery requests.
queue.emptyTitle: No tickets match the current filter
queue.emptyDescription: Create the first ticket or switch the queue filter to see more results.

payment.title: Missing donation after checkout
payment.meta: Payment issue • Updated 5 minutes ago • Assigned to Billing Team
payment.preview: Player did not receive the premium bundle after a successful payment. Payment ID and checkout screenshot are attached.

ban.title: Ban appeal for survival realm
ban.meta: Appeal • Updated 23 minutes ago • Waiting for additional proof
ban.preview: The player submitted an appeal and provided video fragments. The moderator requested the full session recording before review.

account.title: Account recovery and email change
account.meta: Account access • Updated 2 hours ago • Security review completed
account.preview: Ownership was confirmed through the billing history. The account email was updated and the player received recovery steps.

create.title: Create a new ticket
create.description: One form for support, donations, moderation appeals and account recovery.

form.subject: Subject
form.subjectPlaceholder: Describe the issue in one sentence
form.nicknamePlaceholder: Your in-game nickname or account email
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Add all useful details: order number, server, date, screenshots or what already happened before you contacted support.
form.success: Ticket created successfully and loaded from the live queue.

detail.title: Ticket details
detail.description: Selected ticket summary with current owner, priority and server context.
detail.emptyTitle: Select a ticket from the queue
detail.emptyDescription: When you choose a ticket, the full conversation and metadata will appear here.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.description: The dialog history is kept inside the ticket so both the player and staff see the same timeline.

messages.staffReply: Hi! I checked your payment and can see the order in the billing system. I am syncing the reward delivery manually and will confirm once the package is on your account.
messages.playerReply: Thanks. The order number is #48391 and I still do not see the rank on the server after reconnecting.
messages.staffFollowUp: The bundle has been re-issued and the transaction was marked as delivered. Please reconnect once more and let me know if anything is still missing.

composer.label: Reply inside the ticket
composer.placeholder: Write an update, ask for extra proof or confirm that the issue has been resolved.

sla.title: Service targets
sla.description: Typical handling windows for the most common ticket categories.

knowledge.title: Before opening a ticket
knowledge.description: A few quick checks reduce unnecessary waiting and help support resolve the issue faster.

payments.title: Store and donation issues
payments.description: Prepare the payment ID, the checkout email and a screenshot of the successful payment page.

security.title: Account access or recovery
security.description: Have your previous nickname, creation date and any available proof of account ownership ready.

rules.title: Appeals and reports
rules.description: Attach video fragments, timestamps and the moderator decision so staff can verify the full context quickly.

errors.categories: Could not load ticket categories from tickets-service.
errors.tickets: Could not load the ticket queue from tickets-service.
errors.detail: Could not load the selected ticket.
